story.iWant: performance baseline measurements and monitoring for the Walking Skeleton
story.soThat: I can validate performance targets and detect regressions

tasks.task: Create performance test suite with Gatling
Implement load scenarios: 100 concurrent users, 1000 req/s
Configure Prometheus metrics for Widget endpoints
Validate performance targets: API p95 <200ms, event lag <10s
Add performance regression test to nightly CI/CD
Commit: "Add performance baseline with Gatling load tests"

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Performance test suite created with JMeter or Gatling
Load test scenarios: 100 concurrent users, 1000 requests/second
Baseline measurements documented: API p95 latency, event processing lag, throughput
Prometheus metrics configured for Widget endpoints
Performance meets targets: API p95 <200ms, event lag <10s
Performance regression test added to nightly CI/CD

doc.title: Product Requirements Document
doc.snippet: API p95 latency <200ms. Event processing lag <10s. Load testing with 100 concurrent users, 1000 req/s. Performance regression detection.

doc.title: Decision Architecture
doc.snippet: Command latency p95 <200ms. Event processor lag <10s. Prometheus/Micrometer metrics. Performance monitoring KPIs. Regression testing in nightly CI/CD.

doc.title: Epic 2 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: Performance test suite (JMeter/Gatling). Load scenarios (100 users, 1000 req/s). Baseline measurements documented. Prometheus metrics. Targets met. Regression test in nightly.

constraints.constraint: Load test scenarios: 100 concurrent users, 1000 req/s
Performance regression test in nightly CI/CD
Prometheus metrics for all Widget endpoints

pattern.name: Gatling Load Test Pattern

standards.targets: API p95 <200ms, event lag <10s, 1000 req/s throughput

ideas.idea: Create Gatling load test for Widget CRUD operations
Test scenario: 100 concurrent users ramped over 30 seconds
Measure API p95 latency during load test
Measure event processing lag during load test
Verify http_server_requests_seconds metric exists for Widget endpoints
Add performance test to nightly.yml CI/CD workflow
Verify performance test runs on schedule
Include: API latency, event lag, throughput, hardware specs
